title: HMDA Loan Application Register (LAR) Record
description: A single Home Mortgage Disclosure Act Loan Application Register record as returned by the HMDA Data Browser API

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier of the financial institution

loan_purpose.description: Loan purpose (1=Home purchase, 2=Home improvement, 31=Refinancing, 32=Cash-out refinancing, 4=Other, 5=Not applicable)

loan_amount.description: Amount of the covered loan or application

action_taken.description: Action taken on the application (1=Originated, 2=Approved but not accepted, 3=Denied, 4=Withdrawn, 5=Closed for incompleteness, 6=Purchased, 7=Preapproval denied, 8=Preapproval approved but not accepted)

derived_loan_product_type.description: Derived loan product type combining loan type and lien status

derived_dwelling_category.description: Derived dwelling category combining construction method and occupancy type

income.description: Gross annual income of the applicant (in thousands)

rate_spread.description: Difference between the APR and the average prime offer rate

hoepa_status.description: HOEPA status (1=High-cost mortgage, 2=Not a high-cost mortgage, 3=Not applicable)

lien_status.description: Lien status (1=Secured by first lien, 2=Secured by subordinate lien)

loan_term.description: Number of months after which the legal obligation matures

property_value.description: Value of the property securing the covered loan

interest_rate.description: Interest rate for the covered loan

total_loan_costs.description: Total loan costs as defined by Regulation Z
